steps.title: Read the success clues
steps.content: The program identified sidewalks in the vast majority of cases, recognized sidewalk materials, and was described as already performing strongly. The blank needs a word for dependable success.

steps.title: Choose a reliability word
steps.content: B contradicts the strong performance, C contradicts the phrase vast majority, and D shifts to speed even though the sentence is about accuracy and consistency. The answer is A.
